hero_subtitle: SFTY connects provider outputs into automated workflows that assign, escalate, and preserve audit evidence for MLRO review across compliance cases and exceptions.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Case escalation depends on manual routing
problem_description: Compliance teams face delays and inconsistent case handling when MLRO escalations rely on manual interpretation and disconnected workflows. This slows risk response and weakens the auditability of critical compliance decisions.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects provider alerts, internal rules and reviewer actions to route and escalate cases automatically to MLROs while preserving audit logs and decision evidence within one compliance workflow.
workflow_title: From provider checks to mlro escalation
workflow_description: SFTY applies internal rules to provider outputs then routes, escalates, records decisions and preserves evidence for MLRO review and compliance reporting.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another workflow tool. The escalation control layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects provider outputs into structured case escalation, decision logs, and audit-ready evidence to support consistent MLRO review and operational control across compliance workflows.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with controlled case routing, evidence preservation and governance required to meet bank due diligence and enterprise deployment standards.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support MLRO case escalation workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how compliance cases are assigned and routed
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence supports MLRO decision review
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Explain how risk rules trigger automated case escalation
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance escalation workflows?
faq_1_answer: SFTY structures compliance workflows by connecting provider outputs, applying rules, routing reviews, managing cases and escalation, and preserving audit-ready evidence for regulated digital asset compliance teams.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY route cases to MLROs?
faq_2_answer: SFTY automates case assignment based on risk scores and policy rules, supporting relevant cases escalate promptly to MLROs through configured workflows and decision logs.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve case audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves all case details, decision logs, alerts and evidence packages in an auditable record for compliance review and operational traceability.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, connecting their outputs into consistent compliance case workflows without replacing them.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above compliance providers, organizing their outputs into structured workflows and cases rather than replacing underlying KYC, KYT or Travel Rule services.
final_title: Structure MLRO escalation within compliance workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY routes, assigns and preserves audit-ready cases for MLRO escalation in your compliance operations.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
